title: if and else in C++
author: Prodipta Acharjee
concept: if and else choose between two paths based on a condition.
explanation: The comparison >= asks 'greater than or equal'. The branch under if runs when it is true, otherwise the else branch runs.

exercises.question: What does this print?
hints: Yes, so the if branch runs.
No, so the else branch runs.

exercises.question: What does >= mean?
hints: It passes when the values are equal too.
